Omitting the requested caveat about using only the provided data/assumptions (e.g., data source, rounding)
Failing to show the explicit calculation steps requested (e.g., per-item computations, simple difference equations)
Using external or unprovided facts/conversion factors instead of only the given values
Presenting inconsistent or contradictory final answers
Not leading with a single clear, direct answer or identification (burying/ambiguously stating the result)
Incomplete fulfillment of the task scope (e.g., ranking only a subset, omitting required elements)
Adding unnecessary or irrelevant qualitative commentary
Introducing minor inaccuracies through misleading comparisons or interpretations
Failing to explicitly name/identify the required subject (e.g., the specific city or country)
